{% include 'partials/nav.html' %}

Legal Corpus Admin

Website Controller only. Upload Georgia and UCMJ datasets used by Legal Lookup.

Georgia entries: {{ corpus_status.georgia_count }}{% if corpus_status.using_builtin_georgia %} (built-in fallback){% endif %}
UCMJ entries: {{ corpus_status.ucmj_count }}{% if corpus_status.using_builtin_ucmj %} (built-in fallback){% endif %}
Base Order entries: {{ corpus_status.base_order_count }}{% if corpus_status.using_builtin_base_order %} (built-in fallback){% endif %}
Federal USC entries: {{ corpus_status.federal_usc_count }}{% if corpus_status.using_builtin_federal_usc %} (built-in fallback){% endif %}
Corpus folder: {{ corpus_status.directory }}
{% if source_markers %}
OLRC source: {{ source_markers.olrc_url }} ({{ 'reachable' if source_markers.olrc_reachable else 'not reachable from this host' }})
GovInfo source: {{ source_markers.govinfo_url }} ({{ 'reachable' if source_markers.govinfo_reachable else 'not reachable from this host' }})
{% endif %}
Review Weak Searches Federal Source Review
Required columns: code, title, summary, elements. Optional: source, category, subcategory, aliases, synonyms, narrative_triggers, lesser_included_offenses, alternative_offenses, notes, keywords, related_codes, minimum_punishment, maximum_punishment, source_reference, source_version.

Automated Source Ingestion

Bulk ingest legal source material (JSON/CSV/XLSX/PDF/DOCX/TXT), auto-parse, normalize, and import.

Machine-readable records are imported directly; text/PDF/DOCX sources are parsed into citation-backed draft entries.

Federal Official Source URL Ingestion

Paste a JSON endpoint URL for federal USC source data (OLRC/GovInfo mirror or internal feed).

Generic Source URL Ingestion

Import legal rows from JSON/text URL and normalize into Georgia/UCMJ/Base/Federal corpus.

Legal QA

Run built-in legal regression checks before/after corpus updates.

{% if qa_result %}
{% if qa_result.ok %}PASS{% else %}CHECK REQUIRED{% endif %} (exit {{ qa_result.code }})
{% if qa_result.ran_at_utc %}
Last run (UTC): {{ qa_result.ran_at_utc }}
{% endif %} {% if qa_result.output %} 
{{ qa_result.output | join('\n') }}
{% endif %} {% if qa_result.error %} 
{{ qa_result.error | join('\n') }}
{% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
